prompt: Design an improvement to the feature-dev skill so it can hand off implementation cleanly to another agent with a reusable planning artifact. Reuse patterns from this repo where appropriate and give a concrete implementation map.
assertions: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
Defines the planning artifact and what information it should contain for handoff.
Uses a concrete file-backed handoff artifact path and points to a reusable template or schema for it.
Provides a concrete implementation map with file-level changes.
Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
